MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: BRENDA CRUZ KEITH FOR PLAINTIFF KENNETH COLLINS, ALSO PRESENT
ROYAL KENT EDWARDS, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER

This case was settled on the record. The term of the settlement are as follows: Deft. may remain in possession of the premises until 5:oo pm on Jan 31, 2005 on the condition that he makes the following payments: Plaintiff shall apply the remaining security deposit of %$1200.00 To August 2004 rent. Deft. Shall pay the Bal. of $1000.00 in a cashier's check to office of pltif. csl. by 5 Pm. on Sept. 17, 2004 Pltif. Shall waive rent for the month of Sept.2004 so long as Deft. Complies with this stipulation; Deft. Shall pay rent or rental damages in the amount of $2200.00 per month on Nov. 1, 2004, on Dec. 1, 2004 and Jan 1, 2005 By Cashiers check or money order on or before 5:00 PM. To the office of Pltif. Atty. Deft. and all other occupants Shall vacate and surrender possession of the premises, vacate Broom clean and free of personal property and Debris on or before 5:00 PM. On Jan 31 2005. surrender shall be provided by delivering all keys to the premises to pltif. on or before Jan 31 2005 5:PM. The rental agreement for the premises is deemed forfeited so long as Deft. and all other occupants timely vacate on or before 5:oo PM.JAN 31, 2005 and surrender all keys as required by pltif. Then pltif shall dimiss this action with prejudice. If Deft. Fails to make any payment as set forth within 24 hour of when it is due or fails to timely vacate as set forth then upon proper telephonic or other notification from pltif., judgment may be entered .
Judge Pro tem. Nils Rosenquest Clerk Alice Cooper CSR Jo ann Bryce (DEPT 218)
